name_th: เหมียวฝันหวาน
description_en: Dreamy pastel-colored cartoon cats playing among soft clouds, moons, and stars in a magical sky.

name_th: แมวม่านพราย
description_en: Elegant Art Nouveau-style illustrations of playful cats in a warm, vintage-inspired garden with ornate borders.
Playful illustrated cats hidden inside delicious boba tea cups with sweet, colorful vibes.
Elegant traditional Thai mural style cats set against a golden historical city backdrop.

name_th: จันทราขนฟู
description_en: Dreamy, mystical white Persian cats illustrated with soft watercolor washes and moonlight glows.
Cinematic illustrated cats enduring the cozy but exhausted life of late-night office overtime.

name_th: พิกเซลเหมียว
description_en: Vibrant pixel art cats navigating a retro-style urban landscape with playful gaming vibes.

name_th: เจ้าเหมียวหัดเดิน
description_en: Cheerful pastel illustrations of clumsy, lucky kittens exploring soft and sunny outdoor gardens.

name_th: เหมียวละมุน
description_en: Soft, sugary pastel cats illustrated with sweet dessert themes and a warm cozy finish.

name_th: เหมียวซูชิ
description_en: Charming watercolor illustrations of tiny cats integrated into delicious, handmade sushi and bento.

name_th: เหมียวยุ่ง
